entity.label: Eleazar
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A Levite of the family of Merari (1 Chr. 23:21, 22).

nodes.label: Eleazar
nodes.description: A Levite of the family of Merari (1 Chr. 23:21, 22).

nodes.label: Kish
nodes.description: A Levite of the family of Merari (1 Chr. 23:21; 24:29).

verses.text: The sons of Merari; Mahli, and Mushi. The sons of Mahli; Eleazar, and Kish.
And Eleazar died, and had no sons, but daughters: and their brethren the sons of Kish took them.
Of Mahli came Eleazar, who had no sons.
